chromeboardUrl.title: ChromeBoard URL
chromeboardUrl.description: Managed ChromeBoard base URL used for imports.

autoBootstrapOnStartup.title: Auto bootstrap on startup
autoBootstrapOnStartup.description: Open ChromeBoard and seed it when Chrome starts if a new policy signature is detected.

forceReimportOnStartup.title: Force reimport on startup
forceReimportOnStartup.description: Re-run bootstrap every startup even when the policy signature has not changed.

seedFromInstalledApps.title: Seed from installed apps
seedFromInstalledApps.description: Also import installed Chrome-visible apps from chrome.management.

seedPinned.title: Pin imported items
seedPinned.description: Mark imported seed items as pinned inside ChromeBoard.

seedDesktopId.title: Desktop ID
seedDesktopId.description: Optional desktop id to target inside ChromeBoard.

seedTags.title: Default tags
seedTags.description: Tags applied to every managed seed item.

seedItems.title: Managed seed items
seedItems.description: Explicit items to seed into ChromeBoard.
